idea-plugin.name: SQLFolio
idea-plugin.description:
SQLFolio — your personal SQL library inside DataGrip and IntelliJ-based IDEs.

Stop losing useful queries in editor history. SQLFolio lets you save, organise and instantly reuse SQL snippets without ever leaving your IDE.

Key features:
  • Folder-based organisation — group related queries in nested folders
  • Drag & drop — reorder and move queries between folders with a live visual indicator
  • Live search — filter by name or toggle to search inside SQL content
  • One-click execution — run any saved query directly from the panel
  • Copy SQL — copy to clipboard in a single click
  • Duplicate — clone a query as a starting point for variations
  • Export / Import — back up your library to JSON and share with teammates
  • Keyboard shortcuts — Ctrl+Alt+Q to save, Delete to delete, F2 to rename
  • SQL preview tooltip — hover a query to see its SQL without opening it
  • Team sync (BYOB) — share your library in real-time via your own PostgreSQL, SQLite or REST server
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.0
  • Renamed plugin to SQLFolio
  • New plugin icon (orange → purple gradient)
  • Fixed deprecated API usages (ToolWindowFactory)
  • BYOB Sync — bring your own backend: connect via REST API, PostgreSQL or SQLite
  • Real-time sync — PostgreSQL uses LISTEN/NOTIFY (≤ 200 ms), SQLite uses file watcher (≤ 1 s)
  • Version history — every push archives the previous snapshot; configurable retention (default: last 10)
  • Sync status bar — live status indicator with Push Now / Pull Now buttons
  • Schema info — settings page shows the exact DDL with a Copy SQL button
  • Auto-connect on project open
1.0.0
  • Initial release
  • Folder-based query organisation with drag & drop reordering
  • Live search (name + SQL content toggle)
  • Export / Import to JSON
  • Duplicate query, Copy SQL, Capture from Editor
  • Keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+Alt+Q, Delete, F2

action.description: Save the selected (or entire) SQL to SQLFolio
